title: NEED HELP - How to get Alert notification from a number widget in monday.com?
excerpt: I want to create a number widget that will filter the hours per month and send email alert to subscribers when the number crosses a fixed value. (e.g. If the hours worked crosses 10.5 notify xyz)

posts.author: Soumyajit_1995 (Soumyajit Bhattacharya)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to create a number widget that will filter the hours per month and send email alert to subscribers when the number crosses a fixed value. (e.g. If the hours worked crosses 10.5 notify xyz)

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

While this isn’t possible with your Numbers Widget because automations aren’t supported in the Dashboards, you can set this up via automations in the board this number comes from.

Here’s an example of the custom automation recipe you could set up:

Screen Shot 2023-02-16 at 6.07.13 PM1368×594 30.4 KB

Screen Shot 2023-02-16 at 6.07.28 PM1344×604 30.6 KB

Let me know if this helps! I’d love to hear your thoughts!
